indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed is located in the center of the room, which could obstruct the view and make it difficult to focus on the computer.

indicators.name: chair
indicators.rationale: There is a chair near the bed, which can be used for computer work.

indicators.name: floor-wood
indicators.rationale: The wooden floor provides a warm and comfortable surface for sitting.

indicators.name: window-other
indicators.rationale: The window allows natural light to enter, which can be distracting during computer work.

reasoning_summary: The room is moderately suitable for computer work (Solo) due to the presence of a chair and a wooden floor, but the bed's location and the window's position could be improved.
